stem: An operating system (OS) is essential system software on a modern computer.
model_answer: The operating system manages the hardware and resources of the computer, provides a user interface and runs/controls application programs. Typical responsibilities include memory management, processor/process management, file management, peripheral (device) management, and managing user accounts and security.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: State three roles of an operating system.

mark_points.text: manages peripherals/devices OR manages users and security OR provides a user interface
accepted_alternatives: provides a UI for the user
